command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --preset windows-x86-debug && cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug';

if (Test-Path $exe) { Copy-Item $exe '${workspaceFolder}\.deploy\keeperfx.exe' -Force; Write-Host 'keeperfx.exe deployed to .deploy/' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'Build succeeded but exe not found.' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 };

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --preset windows-x86-release && cmake --build --preset windows-x86-release'
docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm linux bash -c 'cmake --preset linux-x64-release && cmake --build --preset linux-x64-release'

linux.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm linux bash -c 'cmake --preset linux-x64-release && cmake --build --preset linux-x64-release'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-release && cmake --build --preset vita-release'

linux.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-release && cmake --build --preset vita-release'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-reldebug && cmake --build --preset vita-reldebug'

linux.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-reldebug && cmake --build --preset vita-reldebug'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-debug && cmake --build --preset vita-debug'

linux.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-debug && cmake --build --preset vita-debug'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --preset windows-x86-debug -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON'
docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug --target clean'
docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --build --preset windows-x86-release --target clean'
